attributes.title: JJ-N Revenue Funnel
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Revenue Funnel","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Revenue Funnel

Use the `elastifund-nontrading-events*` data view with `event.dataset : "elastifund.nontrading"`.

Recommended funnel steps:
- `event.action : "account_researched"`
- `event.action : "message_sent"`
- `event.action : "reply_received"`
- `event.action : "meeting_booked"`
- `event.action : "proposal_sent"`
- `event.action : "outcome_recorded"`

Use `labels.pipeline_stage` for grouping and `elastifund.event_alias` if you want namespaced labels in tables.

Phase 0 note: JJ-N does not yet emit `lead_scored`, approval-decision, or `jjn.cycle.complete` events, so this dashboard tracks the verified funnel baseline only."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Daily Event Volume
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Daily Event Volume","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Daily Event Volume

Recommended Lens view:
- Date histogram on `@timestamp`
- Break down by `event.action`
- Filter: `event.dataset : "elastifund.nontrading"`

Useful splits:
- `labels.engine` to compare Account Intelligence vs Outreach vs Interaction
- `event.outcome` to separate recorded vs blocked/rejected states once those events land
- `labels.environment` to compare paper vs future shadow/live modes"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Funnel KPIs
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Funnel KPIs","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Funnel KPIs

Recommended metric formulas:
- Total researched = count of `account_researched`
- Reply rate = `reply_received / message_sent`
- Meeting rate = `meeting_booked / reply_received`
- Proposal rate = `proposal_sent / meeting_booked`
- Win rate = outcomes with `payload.status : "won"` divided by `proposal_sent`

Use `entity.type`, `labels.engine`, and `payload.account_id` for drilldowns.

Approval latency is not in this event stream yet. Measure it from `approval_requests.created_at` to `approval_requests.reviewed_at` until approval telemetry ships."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Recent Events Table
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Recent Events Table","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Recent Events Table

Recommended Discover columns:
- `@timestamp`
- `labels.engine`
- `labels.pipeline_stage`
- `event.action`
- `event.outcome`
- `entity.type`
- `entity.id`
- `payload.account_id`
- `payload.opportunity_id`

Sort newest first and pin a filter for `event.dataset : "elastifund.nontrading"`. This gives operators a deterministic audit trail without relying on ad-hoc logs."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Approval Coverage
attributes.visState:
{"title":"JJ-N Approval Coverage","type":"markdown","params":{"markdown":"# JJ-N Approval Coverage

Current JJ-N telemetry verifies outbound sends after approval, but it does not yet emit explicit approval-request lifecycle events.

Until those events land, use a companion view sourced from the `approval_requests` table or a normalized transform with:
- pending request count
- median review latency
- oldest pending request age
- approval vs rejection rate

Keep this panel visible so operators can see the gap instead of assuming approval latency is already covered by the event stream."},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: JJ-N Non-Trading Revenue Funnel
attributes.description: Phase 0 non-trading funnel coverage for JJ-N: verified funnel steps, daily event volume, KPI formulas, recent events, and approval coverage notes.
